pattern: A running prefix sum over the gain deltas reconstructs each altitude, and tracking the maximum prefix yields the highest point reached.
hints: The altitude at each point is the cumulative total of all gains seen so far, starting from zero.
Walk through the gains keeping a running total, and remember the largest total observed.
Initialize the answer and a running sum to 0; for each gain add it to the sum and update the answer with the larger of the two.

edge_inputs.description: single negative gain so the peak stays at the start
all negative gains, peak is the starting altitude zero
mixed gains where peak occurs mid-trip
rises then falls back below start

stress.description: random walk of gains across the full value range
